diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Segmental odontomaxillary dysplasia (SOD) with ipsilateral segmental odontomandibular dysplasia
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was based on clinical presentation of congenital maxillary and mandibular alveolar soft tissue enlargement, abnormal trabeculation on panoramic radiograph, congenitally missing teeth, and histologic findings of dysplastic woven bone with prominent reversal lines. Genomic DNA analysis identified a PIK3CA somatic variant in lesional mandibular gingival tissue, supporting the hypothesis of a PIK3CA-related overgrowth spectrum disorder. Differential diagnoses considered included fibrous dysplasia and Becker nevus syndrome, but these were ruled out based on histopathologic features and clinical presentation.
